## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it addresses.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code quality
- [ ] CI / build / dependency change

## Testing Done

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check src/`)
- [ ] Format check passes (`ruff format --check src/`)
- [ ] Type check passes (`mypy src/`)

Describe any manual testing performed:

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (ruff, mypy, type hints)
- [ ] I have added or updated tests to cover my changes
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
- [ ] I have updated documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added a descriptive commit message

## Additional Notes

Any additional information that reviewers should know about this change.
